title: chore: temporarily remove polly model
author: Itachi-1824
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes the `polly` community text model (registry entry, routing config, provider config)
- Temporary — will be re-added later

gist.headline: Polly Takes a Garden Break
gist.blurb: The Polly community text model has stepped out of the registry for a little while. The hive has kept its place warm for its return.
gist.summary: Temporarily removed the `polly` community text model from the text-model registry, routing configuration, and provider configuration until it is re-added later.
gist.impact: The `polly` model will no longer appear among available text models for now, keeping model selection aligned with the active provider setup.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Polly's temporary absence as a cozy garden pause: Polli tends a clearly labeled empty flower pot beside a retro terminal's model list, with a small seed packet suggesting the model will return. Use growing vines and nearby flowers to make the removal feel like a seasonal rest rather than a failure.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polli, the cute bee mascot with a yellow body and dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular blush marks, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wearing a tiny gardener hat while gently watering an empty lime green (#ecf874) flower pot labeled in simple pixel text “POLLY — RESTING”; a retro terminal nearby shows a tidy text-model list, with seeds and code-plants growing around it. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) outlines, subtle CRT glow, nostalgic and emotionally warm.

Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) outlines, subtle CRT glow, nostalgic and emotionally warm.
